name: Gordon

conquest.name: BBQ Feast
conquest.description: Gordon prepares a lavish feast, restoring Health to all troops and increasing their Attack for 4 seconds.

conquest.name: Culinary Chaos
conquest.description: Gordon's life in a chaotic kitchen reduces his damage taken.

conquest.name: Emergency Snack
conquest.description: Gordon's regular snacking restores his Health every 5 seconds.

expedition.name: Super Nutrients
expedition.description: Gordon's culinary masterpieces invigorate our soldiers, increasing total squads' Health.

expedition.name: Trash Talk
expedition.description: Beyond delicious meals, Gordon's trash talk increases the total squads' Attack.

exclusive_gear_note: Epic heroes do not have exclusive gear.

order: Max Super Nutrients (Expedition) FIRST — the 113 code

sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)
gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard cavalry archetype at epic tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).

best_partners.theoretical_synergy: Early-game reliable hero. Gordon's healing kit (BBQ Feast, Emergency Snack) makes him a sustain contributor. Lore-linked to Howard — the two form a complementary Infantry+Cavalry pair.
best_partners.source: kingshotguides.com + lootbar.gg + kingshotmastery.com (community consensus lineup guides)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

joiner.reasoning: Reliable early-game joiner via healing sustain.

lore_background.title: The Mad Chef with a Spatula
lore_background.backstory: Gordon is a legendary chef known as 'the mad chef' for his perfectionism and relentless work ethic. He operates 25 restaurants simultaneously while donating heavily to the poor. His loyalty is famously combative: he once rescued his friend Howard from prison using only a spatula, demonstrating that his battlefield skills can match his kitchen skills.
lore_background.cross_reference: Gordon + Howard — Gordon broke Howard out of prison with a spatula. Second inter-hero lore pair discovered (first was Eric + Hilde).

deep_analysis: Gordon is the reliable early-game sustain hero of Kingshot — a Gen 1 Epic Cavalry hero whose kit is built entirely around healing and squad buffs. His Conquest tree: BBQ Feast restores up to Attack × 280% Health to ALL troops AND buffs their Attack by +7% for 4 seconds (dual-effect team-wide skill), Culinary Chaos reduces his own damage taken by up to 30%, and Emergency Snack regenerates his Health every 5 seconds by up to 70% of his Attack. Expedition skills: Super Nutrients adds +25% squad Health, and Trash Talk adds +25% squad Attack. No exclusive gear. F2P-accessible through 4 routes. heroes.js tier: A Joiner, B Rally — a reliable early pick until stronger heroes come online. His lore is a highlight of the roster: 'the mad chef' who operates 25 restaurants, donates heavily to the poor, and once broke his friend Howard out of prison using nothing but a spatula. He and Howard form the second documented inter-hero lore pair in Kingshot (after Eric + Hilde).
unverified_fields: skill_priority, gear_build, named_pairs, counters, shard_cost — all null

handbook_meta.description: Gordon provides the most consistent defensive joiner contribution in Kingshot with his guaranteed +25% Health buff (effect_op 113). His Epic rarity makes him faster to max than Mythic alternatives, while 2× Saul + 2× Gordon achieves 2.16x DefenseUp—the optimal F2P defensive composition.
